[event]
# Brazier sound effect
type=event
location=8,13,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[event]
# Water dripping sound effect
type=event
location=15,18,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/cave_droplets_loop.ogg

[event]
# Crate
type=event
location=10,11,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,10,11,286
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Crate

[event]
# Lectern
type=event
location=13,15,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/scrolls.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,13,15,276
repeat=false
script=scripts/maps/iron_labyrinth/notes_drop.txt
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_page.ogg
tooltip=Lectern

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=12,8,8,8
category=il_goblin
number=4,7
spawn_level=hero_level,1
